Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1FFC "RESCUE17-6000-1FFC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $6000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Rescue 17.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $6000 to set the current device number ($BA) to $01 (tape) to allow the game to run correctly.
